notes: Meta title, description, canonical URL, and JSON-LD are present and build successfully.
The site includes both person and website structured data for search engines.

issues.summary: `PersonStructuredData` references `https://shreyas.cloud/profile.jpg`, but the repository does not include a matching public asset.

SearchAction targets are inconsistent: the inline SEO JSON-LD points to `/blogs?search=...`, while `WebsiteStructuredData` is configured with `https://shreyas.cloud/search` and converts that to `?q=`.
Profile messaging varies across metadata and visible content, including `Software Engineer`, `Tech Enthusiast`, and `upcoming agentic engineer`, which may dilute consistency.

content.title: Shreyas J
content.description: Shreyas J builds AI systems, full-stack products, and polished web experiences from Mysuru, combining engineering craft with projects-first learning.
